creator: kris@obsecurity.org
text:

> /dev/ad0s3f    /usr            ufs      rw  2  2

> /dev/ad0s4     /usr/home       ufs      rw  2  2

> /usr/home/www  /usr/local/www  unionfs  rw  0  0

> /dev/ad0s5     /mnt/d_disk     msdos    rw,-W=koi2dos,-L=ru_RU.KOI8-R           0       0

Kris
